name: Bank of India Flexi Cap Fund

key_facts.Current NAV: The Current Net Asset Value of the Bank of India Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Plan as of Jul 17, 2026 is Rs 41.42 for Growth option of its Direct plan.
key_facts.Fund Size: The Bank of India Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Plan currently holds Assets under Management worth of Rs 2615.05 crore as on Jun 30, 2026.
key_facts.Expense ratio: The expense ratio of the fund is 0.86% for Direct plan as on Jul 10, 2026.
key_facts.Exit Load: Bank of India Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Plan shall attract an Exit Load, "Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 3 months."
key_facts.Minimum Investment: Minimum investment required is Rs 5000 and minimum additional investment is Rs 1000. Minimum SIP investment is Rs 1000.

performance.Trailing/Category Returns: Its trailing returns over different time periods are: 9.64% (1yr), 22.22% (3yr), 18.11% (5yr) and 26.49% (since launch). Whereas, Category returns for the same time duration are: 1.17% (1yr), 13.33% (3yr) and 12.14% (5yr).

objective: Investment Objective - The scheme seeks to generate long term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in equity and equity-related securities across various market capitalisation.
